meaning: n.信笺上方的印刷文字,印有抬头的信笺
examples: Colleagues at work enjoy having a letterhead with their name at the top.
They had consoled the widow and put his rotten name on their handsome letterhead.
Businesses that might be reordering letterhead stationery are waiting until they run completely out instead.
When was the last time you printed a letter on letterhead and put it in an envelope to mail?
